methodology.shot_model: 2PA, 3PA, and FTA per minute with player shooting percentages
methodology.simulation: 10,000 deterministic player-level simulations combining minute, scoring-rate, and shot-making variation
methodology.market_policy: sportsbook lines and prices are comparison inputs only; they do not alter the projection
methodology.missing_data_policy: neutral documented defaults and explicit quality status
methodology.kelly_policy: displayed units use quarter-Kelly and are capped at 1.0 unit
